2606.07412.title: Socratic-SWE: Self-Evolving Coding Agents via Trace-Derived Agent Skills
2606.07412.paper_summary: LLM-driven software engineering agents have become a central testbed for real-world language-model capability, yet their training remains limited by the availability of high-quality SWE tasks. Existing synthetic data methods typically create tasks through fixed mutation or bug-injection procedures, making the resulting distributions largely independent of the agent's own weaknesses and training progress. We introduce Socratic-SWE, a closed-loop self-evolution framework that reuses the agent's historical solving traces as a source of training signal. Rather than treating traces only as evidence for reward computation, Socratic-SWE distills them into structured agent skills that summarize recurring failures and effective repair patterns. These skills then guide the generation of targeted repair tasks in real repositories. Candidate tasks are checked through execution-based validation and scored with a solver-gradient alignment reward, so that the retained tasks are both verifiable and useful for improving the Solver. The updated Solver produces new traces, enabling the task curriculum to adapt over successive rounds. Across SWE-bench Verified, SWE-bench Lite, SWE-bench Pro, and Terminal-Bench 2.0, Socratic-SWE consistently improves over self-evolving baselines under the same compute budget, reaching 50.40% on SWE-bench Verified after three iterations. These results suggest that solving traces can serve as a scalable substrate for self-evolving SWE agents.
2606.07412.paper_summary_zh: LLM 驅動的軟體工程代理已成為現實世界語言模型能力的核心測試平台，但其訓練仍然受到高品質 SWE 任務可用性的限制。現有的合成數據方法通常通過固定的變異或錯誤注入程序來創建任務，使得生成的分佈在很大程度上獨立於代理自身的弱點和訓練進度。我們介紹了 Socratic-SWE，一個閉環自我演化框架，重用代理的歷史解決痕跡作為訓練信號的來源。Socratic-SWE 不僅將痕跡視為獎勵計算的證據，而是將其提煉為結構化的代理技能，總結重複出現的失敗和有效的修復模式。這些技能然後指導在真實代碼庫中生成針對性的修復任務。候選任務通過基於執行的驗證進行檢查，並以解決者梯度對齊獎勵進行評分，以確保保留的任務既可驗證又對改善解決者有用。更新的解決者生成新的痕跡，使得任務課程能夠在後續輪次中適應。在 SWE-bench Verified、SWE-bench Lite、SWE-bench Pro 和 Terminal-Bench 2.0 中，Socratic-SWE 在相同計算預算下持續超越自我演化基準，在經過三次迭代後，在 SWE-bench Verified 上達到 50.40%。這些結果表明，解決痕跡可以作為自我演化 SWE 代理的可擴展基礎。
2606.07412.author: Chuan Xiao et.al.
2606.07412.authors: Chuan Xiao, Zhengbo Jiao, Shaobo Wang, Wei Wang, Bing Zhao, Hu Wei, Linfeng Zhang, Lin Qu
